articles.description: All the reaction to Nottingham Forest's first-leg win over Aston Villa, plus Premier League news conferences to come.
articles.title: Europa League semi-final: Advantage Nottingham Forest after first-leg win against Aston Villa

articles.description: Watch live coverage and follow text updates as John Higgins takes on Shaun Murphy and Wu Yize faces Mark Allen in the World Snooker Championship semi-finals at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026 LIVE: Watch John Higgins vs Shaun Murphy & Wu Yize vs Mark Allen in semi-final action - stream, scores, results

articles.description: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf, but what does this mean for the country's other sporting investments? Dan Roan takes a closer look.
articles.title: LIV Golf: Is Saudi Arabia's sports revolution unravelling?

articles.description: Pop star Dua Lipa is not expected to perform at the heavyweight bout between Anthony Joshua and Tyson Fury later this year.
articles.title: Fury vs Joshua: Pop star Dua Lipa not expected to perform at event

articles.description: Head coach Eddie Howe says Newcastle's owners remain "ambitious" for the club despite the Saudi Arabian PIF's decision to pull out of funding LIV Golf.
articles.title: Newcastle United: Saudi Arabian owners' desire for club 'unchanged' says boss Eddie Howe

articles.description: Michael van Gerwen is punched in the face by a stranger in an attack at a bar in the Netherlands.
articles.title: Michael van Gerwen punched in face during bar attack in the Netherlands

articles.description: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk is appealing against a four-year doping ban but why has the process been kept secret, and what happens now?
articles.title: Mykhailo Mudryk: Why was Chelsea winger given secret ban?

articles.description: Without Mohamed Salah, Liverpool need others to take responsibility and the focus is set to intensify on Alexander Isak and Florian Wirtz.
articles.title: Time for Alexander Isak and Florian Wirtz to prove they are Liverpool's future

articles.description: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery says VAR made a "huge mistake" in not sending off Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson in their Europa League semi-final first leg.
articles.title: Unai Emery: Villa boss furious with VAR for not sending off Elliot Anderson

articles.description: American skiing great Lindsey Vonn says she is still "too emotional" to make a decision on her future career as she faces at least 18 months of recuperation.
articles.title: Lindsey Vonn still in 'survival mode' after Olympic crash and unsure whether to retire
